CustomField.description: If checked, a Re-Opened lead (previously Booked) is assigned back to the same executive. If unchecked, it goes through round robin. Default checked.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When ON, a Re-Opened lead of a previously Booked customer is assigned back to the same executive. When OFF, the Re-Opened lead is assigned via round robin. Default ON.
CustomField.label: Reopen To Same Executive
